title: cynanchum trollii
intro: Cynanchum trollii, also known as Troll's Bells, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynanchum trollii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cynanchum trollii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be made into a salve or tincture for topical application.
